title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at FM Logistic India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at FM Logistic India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
